title: [MTR4] TCL Buses
description:
This pack adds real-life Lyon buses to the Minecraft Transit Railway mod. For now, it is just a retextured VDL Citea.

Original VDL Citea by szandorthe13th
body:
This pack is made for [Minecraft Transit Railway](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway).

This pack contains the following buses:
- IVECO Urbanway 12 TCL (White/Red Livery)
- IVECO Urbanway 12 TCL (Black/Red Livery - Orange leds)
- IVECO Urbanway 12 TCL (Black/Red Livery - White leds)
- IVECO New Urbanway 12 TCL (Black/Red Livery - Orange leds)
- IVECO New Urbanway 12 TCL (Black/Red Livery - White leds)
